jobs.title: Senior Healthcare Business Analyst
jobs.description: Lead payer business analysis for claims adjudication, EDI 837 and 835 remittance workflows, HEDIS reporting, SQL validation, Jira backlog grooming, UAT, and stakeholder documentation. US work authorization required.

jobs.title: Healthcare Data Analyst
jobs.description: Analyze Medicaid and Medicare claims, encounter submissions, HEDIS quality measures, care gaps, member outreach data, and supplemental data feeds using SQL, Excel, Tableau, and Power BI.

jobs.title: Interoperability Business Analyst
jobs.description: Document FHIR API, HL7 v2, CCD, eligibility 270/271, and payer-provider data exchange requirements. Coordinate integration testing, workflow mapping, business rules, and UAT with product and engineering teams.

jobs.title: Business Systems Analyst - Claims Configuration
jobs.description: Own payer operations requirements for benefit setup, claims configuration, EDI 834 enrollment, 837 claims, 835 remittance, SQL data validation, process documentation, and release readiness.

jobs.title: HEDIS Reporting Analyst
jobs.description: Support HEDIS, Stars, quality measures, care gap closure, population health reporting, claims analytics, SQL extracts, provider outreach analysis, and CMS reporting documentation.

jobs.title: Clinical Quality Business Analyst
jobs.description: Partner with clinical quality and provider analytics teams on care management workflows, quality measures, HEDIS supplemental data, HL7 interfaces, SQL validation, and business process documentation.
